user.title: Smart Shade Scheduler
user.description: Select the entity whose state represents the current automation mode (e.g. an `input_select` with values like KUEHLEN, NORMAL, REGEN).

error.entity_not_found: Entity not found. Please check the entity ID.

add_rule.title: Add shade rule
add_rule.description:
Rules are evaluated top-to-bottom; the **first match wins** for each cover. Sun conditions are optional — leave them empty to create a catch-all for that mode.

**Tip:** create specific rules first (with sun conditions), then a catch-all rule (without conditions) as a fallback.

data_description.mode: Must match the mode entity state exactly (e.g. `KUEHLEN`).
data_description.azimuth_above: Rule only applies when sun azimuth exceeds this value. Leave empty to ignore.
data_description.elevation_above: Rule only applies when sun elevation exceeds this value. Leave empty to ignore.
data_description.elevation_below: Rule only applies when sun elevation is below this value. Leave empty to ignore.
data_description.position: 0 = fully closed, 100 = fully open. Leave empty to control tilt only.
data_description.tilt: 0 = slats closed, 100 = slats open. Leave empty to skip tilt control.

manage_rules.title: Manage rules
manage_rules.description: Select a rule to edit or delete.

rule_action.title: What would you like to do?

data_description.mode: Must match the mode entity state exactly.
data_description.position: 0 = fully closed, 100 = fully open. Leave empty to skip.
data_description.tilt: 0 = slats closed, 100 = slats open. Leave empty to skip.

delete_rule.title: Delete rule
delete_rule.description: Are you sure you want to delete **{rule_name}**? This cannot be undone.

data_description.tolerance: A cover is only moved if it deviates more than this many percent from the target.
data_description.dnd_start: No automated movements after this time.
data_description.dnd_end: Automated movements resume at this time.
data_description.wipe_time: All manual overrides are cleared at this time each day.
